name: codetrust
summary: AI Governance Enforcement Platform — 286 rules, 10 enforcement layers, 5 enterprise services. AI Governance Gateway blocks destructive AI agent actions (82 real-time rules). Hallucination Detection verifies imports against PyPI/npm/crates.io/Go/Maven/NuGet/RubyGems/Packagist. Trust Score tracks governance drift. CVE scanning, license compliance, cross-file analysis, auto-fix PRs, RBAC. 54 API endpoints, 27 MCP tools, 1954 tests. CLI, VS Code extension, GitHub Action, MCP server.
